title: chamaecrista orbiculata var. cercidifolia
intro: Chamaecrista orbiculata var. cercidifolia, also known as sensitive plant, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, characterized by its ability to fold its leaves when touched. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Chamaecrista orbiculata var. cercidifolia include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues. This plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
